overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting a character walking along a canal in ancient Alexandria, ascending a grand ceremonial staircase lined with statues and obelisks, and approaching a temple entrance. The scene features bright midday sunlight, clear skies, and detailed ancient Egyptian architecture with stone textures and burning braziers.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side promenade with stone quay and classical architecture

events.description: camera turns left toward the grand staircase, leaving the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canal-side promenade, passing a burning brazier and approaching a monumental staircase

entered.detail: calm water reflecting sunlight, bordered by stone quay
tall stone retaining wall with arched niches supporting upper buildings
ornate pedestal with flames, passed on the right side
multi-story stone buildings with columns and tiled roofs atop the quay wall
arched stone bridge spanning the canal in the distance
tall stone obelisk with hieroglyphic carvings becoming visible as camera turns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit canal-side promenade with patterned stone pavement. The camera moves along the water, passing a burning brazier on a pedestal, with classical stone buildings rising on the left atop a retaining wall. Around 12 seconds, the camera turns toward a grand staircase entrance, revealing a hieroglyphic obelisk in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial staircase flanked by statues and obelisks

events.description: transition from waterfront promenade to ascending grand staircase
passing the large stone lion statue at the base of the upper stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase, passing between tall female statues and burning braziers, moving toward the temple above

entered.detail: wide stone steps ascending between retaining walls
tall marble statue of robed female figure holding a vessel, mirrored on right side
large recumbent lion sculpture on pedestal at staircase landing
tall ornate pedestals with flames flanking the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a monumental stone staircase flanked by tall female statues holding vessels and burning braziers. The canal falls behind as the camera passes a large stone lion statue at the landing. Hieroglyphic obelisks frame the ascent, and the classical buildings recede into the background while the temple above grows larger.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with columned entrance and red-carpeted stairs

events.description: reaching the top of the staircase and entering the temple courtyard
approaching the temple entrance between the columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the tree-lined courtyard toward the temple entrance, passing between sphinx statues and ascending the red-carpeted stairs

notable_agents.action: guard in red clothing standing near the temple entrance

entered.detail: grand classical temple with gabled roof and ornate golden facade
tall white columns supporting the temple entrance portico
wide staircase with red carpet runner leading to the entrance
manicured trees lining the courtyard approach
stone sphinx sculptures flanking the temple stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide temple courtyard, leaving the grand staircase behind. A hieroglyphic obelisk stands prominently on the left as the camera approaches the temple between manicured trees. The temple entrance features tall columns, white drapery, and a red-carpeted staircase flanked by sphinx statues. A guard stands near the entrance as the camera moves toward the portico.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit canal-side promenade up a monumental staircase and into a grand temple courtyard. It begins by gliding along a patterned stone pavement beside the water, passing a burning brazier and classical buildings before turning toward a distant hieroglyphic obelisk. As the camera ascends the grand staircase, the canal recedes and the view is framed by tall female statues and burning braziers, passing a stone lion at the landing while the temple above grows larger. The scene then opens into a wide courtyard where the camera moves past manicured trees and a prominent obelisk toward the temple entrance. Finally, the movement concludes at the portico, approaching tall columns and white drapery with a red-carpeted staircase flanked by sphinx statues and a standing guard.
